think_blocks:
The user wants me to identify and segment every scrimmage play in the video.

1.  **Analyze the Request:**
    *   **Goal:** Find every scrimmage play.
    *   **Start Time:** Moment the first defensive player makes visible physical contact with the ball carrier (collision, arms wrapping, tackle initiation).
    *   **End Time:** When play action has visibly stopped (carrier motionless, ball out of bounds, incomplete pass, score confirmed).
    *   **Special Case:** If no defender contact occurs before the dead ball (e.g., uncontested scores), use the dead ball moment as both start and end, and describe contact as "no_contact_before_dead_ball".
    *   **Output Format:** JSON.

2.  **Scan the Video for Scrimmage Plays:**

    *   **Play 1:** 00:05 - 00:11
        *   Context: 3rd & 10, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Purdy drops back, throws incomplete.
        *   Contact: No contact with ball carrier (Purdy) before the ball is thrown/incomplete.
        *   Start: 00:05 (Snap/Throw initiation)
        *   End: 00:11 (Ball hits ground)
        *   Result: Incomplete pass.

    *   **Play 2:** 01:04 - 01:12
        *   Context: 3rd & 10, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Purdy drops back, throws incomplete.
        *   Contact: No contact with ball carrier.
        *   Start: 01:04 (Snap/Throw initiation)
        *   End: 01:12 (Ball hits ground)
        *   Result: Incomplete pass.

    *   **Play 3:** 01:24 - 01:31
        *   Context: 4th & 9, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Purdy drops back, sacked by Rashan Gary.
        *   Contact: Gary hits Purdy.
        *   Start: 01:27 (Gary hits Purdy)
        *   End: 01:31 (Purdy on ground)
        *   Result: Sack/Loss.

    *   **Play 4:** 02:22 - 02:30
        *   Context: 4th & 9, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Field goal attempt by Jake Moody.
        *   Contact: No contact with ball carrier (holder/kicker).
        *   Start: 02:22 (Snap/Hold)
        *   End: 02:30 (Kick goes through)
        *   Result: Field Goal.

    *   **Play 5:** 03:18 - 03:22
        *   Context: 1st & 10, Packers ball.
        *   Action: Jordan Love throws deep to Romeo Doubs for a touchdown.
        *   Contact: No contact before score.
        *   Start: 03:20 (Doubs catches ball)
        *   End: 03:22 (Doubs in endzone)
        *   Result: Touchdown.

    *   **Play 6:** 03:53 - 04:03
        *   Context: 1st & 10, Packers ball.
        *   Action: Love throws short to Jayden Reed, tackled immediately.
        *   Contact: Reed tackled by multiple defenders.
        *   Start: 03:56 (Reed caught and tackled)
        *   End: 04:03 (Reed on ground)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 7:** 04:32 - 04:39
        *   Context: 2nd & 8, Packers ball.
        *   Action: Love throws short to Jayden Reed, tackled immediately.
        *   Contact: Reed tackled by Ambry Thomas.
        *   Start: 04:35 (Reed caught and tackled)
        *   End: 04:39 (Reed on ground)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 8:** 05:18 - 05:26
        *   Context: 3rd & 2, Packers ball.
        *   Action: Love throws incomplete.
        *   Contact: No contact with ball carrier.
        *   Start: 05:21 (Ball in air)
        *   End: 05:26 (Ball hits ground)
        *   Result: Incomplete pass.

    *   **Play 9:** 06:06 - 06:17
        *   Context: 4th & 2, Packers ball.
        *   Action: Punt by Daniel Whelan.
        *   Contact: No contact with ball carrier (punter).
        *   Start: 06:06 (Snap/Punt)
        *   End: 06:17 (Fair catch)
        *   Result: Punt.

    *   **Play 10:** 07:01 - 07:08
        *   Context: 1st & 10, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: McCaffrey runs up middle, tackled.
        *   Contact: McCaffrey tackled by multiple defenders.
        *   Start: 07:03 (McCaffrey hit)
        *   End: 07:08 (McCaffrey on ground)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 11:** 07:38 - 07:46
        *   Context: 2nd & 6, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: McCaffrey runs up middle, breaks tackle, gains first down.
        *   Contact: McCaffrey hit by multiple defenders.
        *   Start: 07:40 (McCaffrey hit)
        *   End: 07:46 (McCaffrey gets up)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 12:** 08:18 - 08:25
        *   Context: 1st & 10, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: McCaffrey runs, tackled by Jonathan Owens.
        *   Contact: McCaffrey tackled by Owens.
        *   Start: 08:20 (McCaffrey hit)
        *   End: 08:25 (McCaffrey on ground)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 13:** 08:56 - 09:02
        *   Context: 2nd & 10, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Purdy throws incomplete.
        *   Contact: No contact with ball carrier.
        *   Start: 08:58 (Ball in air)
        *   End: 09:02 (Ball hits ground)
        *   Result: Incomplete pass.

    *   **Play 14:** 09:32 - 09:41
        *   Context: 3rd & 10, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Purdy throws to Juwan Jennings, caught and tackled.
        *   Contact: Jennings tackled by Preston Smith.
        *   Start: 09:37 (Jennings caught and tackled)
        *   End: 09:41 (Jennings on ground)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 15:** 10:17 - 10:25
        *   Context: 1st & 10, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Purdy throws to McCaffrey, tackled by Rashaan Savage.
        *   Contact: McCaffrey tackled by Savage.
        *   Start: 10:21 (McCaffrey caught and tackled)
        *   End: 10:25 (McCaffrey on ground)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 16:** 11:01 - 11:08
        *   Context: 2nd & 10, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Purdy throws incomplete to Kittle.
        *   Contact: No contact with ball carrier.
        *   Start: 11:03 (Ball in air)
        *   End: 11:08 (Ball hits ground)
        *   Result: Incomplete pass.

    *   **Play 17:** 11:46 - 11:54
        *   Context: 3rd & 10, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Purdy throws incomplete.
        *   Contact: No contact with ball carrier.
        *   Start: 11:48 (Ball in air)
        *   End: 11:54 (Ball hits ground)
        *   Result: Incomplete pass.

    *   **Play 18:** 12:25 - 12:32
        *   Context: 4th & 10, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Punt by Mitch Wishnowsky.
        *   Contact: No contact with ball carrier.
        *   Start: 12:25 (Snap/Punt)
        *   End: 12:32 (Fair catch)
        *   Result: Punt.

    *   **Play 19:** 13:10 - 13:24
        *   Context: 1st & 10, Packers ball.
        *   Action: Aaron Jones runs, tackled by multiple defenders.
        *   Contact: Jones tackled by multiple defenders.
        *   Start: 13:19 (Jones hit)
        *   End: 13:24 (Jones on ground)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 20:** 13:36 - 13:43
        *   Context: 1st & 10, Packers ball.
        *   Action: Aaron Jones runs, breaks tackle, gains yards.
        *   Contact: Jones hit by defenders.
        *   Start: 13:38 (Jones hit)
        *   End: 13:43 (Jones stops)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 21:** 14:49 - 14:58
        *   Context: 1st & 5, Packers ball.
        *   Action: AJ Dillon runs, leaps over defender, gains first down.
        *   Contact: Dillon leaps over defender, no tackle until out of bounds.
        *   Start: 14:53 (Dillon leaps)
        *   End: 14:58 (Dillon out of bounds)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 22:** 15:35 - 15:44
        *   Context: 1st & 10, Packers ball.
        *   Action: Love throws to Kraft, tackled immediately.
        *   Contact: Kraft tackled by Fred Warner.
        *   Start: 15:39 (Kraft caught and tackled)
        *   End: 15:44 (Kraft on ground)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 23:** 16:17 - 16:24
        *   Context: 2nd & 10, Packers ball.
        *   Action: Aaron Jones runs, tackled by Greenlaw.
        *   Contact: Jones tackled by Greenlaw.
        *   Start: 16:19 (Jones hit)
        *   End: 16:24 (Jones on ground)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 24:** 17:00 - 17:07
        *   Context: 3rd & 9, Packers ball.
        *   Action: Love throws incomplete.
        *   Contact: No contact with ball carrier.
        *   Start: 17:02 (Ball in air)
        *   End: 17:07 (Ball hits ground)
        *   Result: Incomplete pass.

    *   **Play 25:** 17:18 - 17:24
        *   Context: 4th & 9, Packers ball.
        *   Action: Field goal attempt by Anders Carlson.
        *   Contact: No contact with ball carrier.
        *   Start: 17:18 (Snap/Hold)
        *   End: 17:24 (Kick misses)
        *   Result: Missed Field Goal.

    *   **Play 26:** 18:23 - 18:31
        *   Context: 1st & 10, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Purdy throws to Jennings, caught and tackled.
        *   Contact: Jennings tackled by Preston Smith.
        *   Start: 18:27 (Jennings caught and tackled)
        *   End: 18:31 (Jennings on ground)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 27:** 19:02 - 19:08
        *   Context: 2nd & 3, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: McCaffrey runs, breaks tackle, gains yards.
        *   Contact: McCaffrey hit by multiple defenders.
        *   Start: 19:04 (McCaffrey hit)
        *   End: 19:08 (McCaffrey stops)
        *   Result: Gain.

    *   **Play 28:** 19:39 - 19:45
        *   Context: 3rd & 1, 49ers ball.
        *   Action: Purdy sneaks, gains first down.
        *   Contact: Purdy hit by multiple defenders.
        *   Start: 19:40 (Purdy hit)
        *   End: 19:45 (Purdy on ground)
        *   Result: Gain.

3.  **Construct JSON:** Assemble the identified segments into the required JSON format.

    *   Play 1: 00:05 - 00:11, Q3, 3rd & 10, SF 35, Pass, Incomplete, 0, no_contact_before_dead_ball, shotgun, False
    *   Play 2: 01:04 - 01:12, Q3, 3rd & 10, SF 35, Pass, Incomplete, 0, no_contact_before_dead_ball, shotgun, False
    *   Play 3: 01:24 - 01:31, Q3, 4th & 9, SF 35, Pass, Loss, -5, open_field_tackle, shotgun, False
